title: Psychanthus trichocalyx
taxonomy: Psychanthus trichocalyx is classified as a species within the genus Psychanthus and the family Arecaceae, which includes palm trees. The genus Psychanthus is a small group of palm species native to Madagascar. The family Arecaceae is a large and diverse group of plants that includes over 2,600 species of palm trees. Psychanthus trichocalyx is further classified as a member of the subfamily Arecoideae. It is one of the many species within the genus Psychanthus that are endemic to the island of Madagascar.
